creator: lupe@lupe-christoph.de
text:
I'm afraid you missed a similar problem in pkg-install in both ports.:
	if ! grep -q "^${u}:" /etc/passwd; then

I'll submit two PRs with complete patches. Thanks for sending this PR.

Lupe Christoph
--
